name: @boundedhq/beagle
description: A local transparency proxy for AI agents: see exactly what your agents send to remote models, with leaked secrets flagged as they leave.

scripts.lint: bun scripts/lint-bun-imports.ts && bun scripts/lint-viewer-safety.ts && bun scripts/lint-docs-claims.ts
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run loc:check && tsc --noEmit && bun test
